prompt: Simulate being the Red Hat Lightspeed Agent responding to a real user. Show the actual response, including simulated tool calls with realistic data.

assertions.name: uses_get_cves_not_system_cves
assertions.description: Uses vulnerability__get_cves (global) rather than vulnerability__get_system_cves (per-system) since no specific system is named

assertions.name: single_call_omitting_severity
assertions.description: Makes exactly ONE vulnerability__get_cves call that OMITS the severity parameter entirely, relying on sort=-cvss_score to naturally surface Critical and Important CVEs. Does NOT make two separate calls with severity=Critical and severity=Important

assertions.name: cites_multi_severity_strategy
assertions.description: Explicitly references or demonstrates awareness of the multi-severity handling strategy — mentions that severity is single-value-only, or explains WHY severity is omitted in favor of CVSS sorting

assertions.name: uses_affecting_filter
assertions.description: Uses affecting=true to restrict results to CVEs that actually affect at least one of the user's systems

assertions.name: uses_cvss_sort
assertions.description: Sorts by CVSS score descending (sort=-cvss_score) to surface the most critical results first
